name: Magor Marsh GWT (Gwent Levels)
highlights: Last fragment of fen on the Gwent Levels — dragonflies, water vole and reed bunting.
points_of_interest: Gwent Wildlife Trust reserve; Medieval reen system; otter holt
parking_start: GWT Magor Marsh car park (free, donations)
food_drink_nearby: Wheatsheaf Inn Magor; The Square & Compass Caldicot
hazards_notes: Boardwalk slippery when wet; mosquitoes in summer
